race.description: ‘Boot’ Calcutta Saturday @ Wsm & Gc Maiden Plate
race.comment: ERION (2) best effort in some time after he went forward for a game second over 1200m at Cowra. Races best with his runs spaced and can overcome the sticky gate. Each-way. PENCILLER (11) handy gelding resuming. Expected to get off the mark quickly this prep after going under narrowly at his last three outings. Back without a trial and will appreciate Neale's claim. Top-three contender. HABIB ALBI (7) came in for late support on debut with a poor last over 1000m at Hawkesbury. Kept fresh for this from the good draw and no shock to see him close strongly. AIZUCHI (6) three-year-old gelding by Grunt from Hachi Oki on debut for the Allison Smith yard. Has shown ability in the last two trials and gets his chance from the low barrier.
